    Arena
    The Arena class represents an arena venue with a name, type, and capacity.

    The Auditorium class represents an auditorium venue with a name, type, and capacity.

    The Field class represents a field venue with a name, type, and capacity.

    OpenAir
    The OpenAir class represents an open air venue with a name, type, and capacity.

    Outdoor
    The Outdoor class represents an outdoor venue with a name, type, and capacity.

    Stadium
    The Stadium class represents a stadium venue with a name, type, and capacity.
